top_title: The world’s smartest, easiest and fastest POS System to use.
overview_title: An overview of the Cashierc program’s operating mechanism, and its response to all types of devices such as computers, laptops, tablets, cell phones, printers (bills, receipts), scanners, internet devices and also supports Excel in terms of uploading or downloading data
security_title: All your data will be encrypted and hashed, Keeping your business and customers information secure enables you to build and maintain trust with shoppers.
updates_title: Cashierc will be always up to date without visiting the store. In less than seconds without affecting your work.
devices_title_1: Compatibility with POS devices such as barcode scanners, printers, and cashier drawers
devices_italic_1: Here are some of the features of printing and scanning
devices_feature_1: Customize and add a design for the form of the receipt, and you can also add your store logo, name, number with an addition that makes you control every part inside the receipt form.
devices_feature_2: Speed of response when registering a new barcode for a product, searching for a product by barcode, modifying and deleting a barcode for products, and a barcode is generated automatically for each order on the receipt for easy access to requests and review
devices_feature_3: Printing reports, statistics and tables for all parts of the store and the data that you have entered for your store. Supports (A4 - A5) also supports (Excel[XLSX + CSV] - PDF)
devices_feature_4: Quick ability to print the last receipt for every cashier or admin, and you can also print the receipt or invoice for any order you choose.
devices_p_1: And many features you can learn in the course of the program
orders_monitor_italic_1: The most prominent features inside creating order monitor
orders_monitor_p1:
1- Use a lot of offers and discounts on the product or on the entire order.
2- Fast response and high performance without the need to use a mouse.
3- Easily access to clients gifts, which motivates customers to buy again.
4- If a customer upon creating the order, changes his mind to buy a specific product, the cashier can put the order to the drafts and re-complete the order from the drafts again, To not delay the rest of the customers.
5- When there is a client, the order is added to him according to his code registered by the admin or whoever has the permission to add clients so you could control your clients and watch your clients orders and interests.
6- Multiple payment methods : Cash, Debit and Credit.
7- Delivery system.
8- Knowing the remaining pieces of a specific product, viewing the description, knowing the total price of the number of pieces of the product without having to go to another screen.
join_newsletter_title: join our subscribers list to get the latest news, updates and a lot of offers coming soon to your inbox
contact_us_title: Please select a topic below related to your inquiry. if you don't find what you need select other and fill out our contact form
done_contact: Your message has been sent, we will send you a reply as soon as possible
already_contact: You have already sent your message
faq_title: Some frequently asked questions between users and store owners about the program and operating methods
question1: Why Cashierc? what's the difference between it and other Point Of Sale programs?
question2: Is Cashierc compatible with my existing hardware?
question3: I’m not a techie person, will I have a hard time migrating my products and customers to Cashierc program?
question4: I’m a very busy person, how much time does it take to set up Cashierc?
question5: I want to use Cashierc on Mobile or Tablet, is it going to work for me?
answer1: Cashierc let's you control of every single data of your data, makes you show up orders and product with charts and reports to helps you making your store better and to know what your clients order a lot, beside the quick and detailed functions in our program that allows you to do many tasks and accounting with your data. With Cashierc all of your data is safe in the cloud storage which you can backup, restore and delete your data whenever you want. beside that we always updating our software daily to make a high security, design and create new additions which helps you and save your time.
answer2: It's very compatible for any printers, scanners, internet devices and any operating system. We focus on making the software work with the best and most commonly used retail hardware and we hear a lot from retailers using Cashierc successfully with printers we’d never even heard of.
answer3: It's not that hard. You have to add your data with a high and fast functions in our software enables you to complete your data easily and quickly. beside that every single page in Cashierc has been explained in our Youtube channel.
answer4: It will not take long, just add your store data, such as categories,  sub-categories, products and users (managers and cashiers). Once that, you can start, and you can complete adding, modifying, or deleting data at any time.
answer5: Certainly, a large number of users prefer to use the program on mobile devices because it is light and enables you to move anywhere. Cashierc application design helps you to do that because it is fully compatible and responsive with all types of devices such as mobile phone, tablet, laptop and computer, and it also supports all types of screens.
reports_title: Daily, monthly, yearly statistics and reports for every single part and exporting as Excel(Xlsx, CSV), PDF and printing as A4.
responsive_title: Whatever the device Cashierc is ready! Works on PCs, Laptop, Tablet, Android, Mac.
inventory_title: Through detailed functions and processes you can make your inventory for all branches easily and faster than before.
full_control_title: Cashierc make you control everything such as categories, sub-categories, products, orders, damaged, returned, etc...
seo_desc_welcome: Cashierc is a Point of sale system for organization, management and analysis that works on PC, Android, tablets, and iOS devices.
seo_desc_contact: We work 24/7. Our team is always ready to respond to inquiries and requests for the application.
seo_desc_faq: Some questions and inquiries about the application were typically answered.
seo_desc_overview: An overview of the contents of the program and its activity, and the features offered by Casheric.
seo_desc_features: The most prominent features, characteristics and uses of the program that help you manage your business.
pricing_title: Cashierc provides many price plans that help you choose the best plan for you
payment_methods: The ability to pay through these available methods.
overview_silder_4: Get in touch with cashierc in all devices with a high responsive design.
overview_silder_3: Care of your clients with gift cards and coupons to make your store famous.
overview_silder_2: Fast scan barcode and Generating barcode for every receipt.
overview_silder_1: Track your reports wherever you are, anytime with a responsive dashboard.
feature_p_3: Having reports and statistics in your store facilitates many calculations and saves effort and time, and there is no need for paper anymore in Cashierc.
feature_3_5: Daily, weekly, monthly, quarterly, semi-annual, and annual inventory.
feature_3_6: Reports and graphs to facilitate statistical operations.
feature_3_7: Comparisons of products, purchase ratio and cost of sale between each of them.
feature_text_3: And many features and countless reports, tables and graphs covering every part of the store.
feature_p_4: Cashierc helps you improve and accelerate your business’s performance, with the ease of changing, creating, deleting and displaying the contents of your store and your private, protected data.
feature_text_4: Here are some features to improve the performance and speed of work ...
feature_4_8: You create and modify products, and the update process is done for all devices and workers at the same moment, there is no need to create products on each device separately.
feature_4_9: Record the data of suppliers, customers, cashiers and managers and have access to their data at any time.
feature_4_10: You can create an inventory, save it to the program and download it at any time, on any device you have.
expiration_title: The free trial period has expired
expiration_desc: Please read the written instructions below to continue using your Cashierc service
exp_1: We are sorry to inform you that your free 14-day period has expired. But we still keep all your store data and all the data you recorded during your experience as your Cashierc service, By subscribing with us, all data will be retrieved again and all your store accounts will work permanently.
exp_2: You can subscribe to your Cashierc service with 3 pricing plans
exp_3: If you want to delete all your store data and stop your accounts with your Cashierc, please fill out the form below:
deactivate_btn: Delete and deactivate your accounts with Cashierc
confirm_deactivate: I agree that all data will be permanently deleted and I will not be able to retrieve it again, and in case of subscription, I will add my data again from the beginning.
deactivate_title: Permanently deactivate and delete my store accounts
deactivate_form_title: Please note that if you fill out this form, your accounts will be permanently disabled and deleted.
please_wait_deactivating: Please wait, your account is being deactivated...
deactivate_successfully: Your account has been disabled, all your store data has been deleted, we're sorry you left and we hope you'll come back again!
deactivate_error: Something went wrong, please check the fields carefully and try again.
register_free_trial_title: Create a free account in Cashierc
register_free_trial_desc: Enter your personal data and your store data to get a free trial period that contains all the features of the Cashierc program
please_username_english: Please write your store name in english without any spaces
please_wait_register: Please wait while setting up your store account...
register_successfully: Your account has been created successfully, Redirecting to your control panel
something_went_wrong_404_title: It seems like you visiting a page that not exists, Maybe it's not available right now!
will_be_redirect_to_home_in_seconds: You will be redirected to home in 4 seconds...
register_free_trial_p:
Start your free trial now of 14 days and build your POS system in 10 minutes for free and ready for use in an unlimited branches, products, users, orders and more!
With only 3 steps you can start using your new POS system:
1- Complete free trial registration form above.
2- Add categories, products, admins, cashiers, etc...
3- Go to your settings page and setup your personal settings for example : (Receipt Style, Language, Branches, Delivery Fees, etc...)
Now you're ready to use on your stores!
desktop_provider_p: Cashierc program as a service provider makes it easier for users to use the features of the program in a faster and organized way.
android_app_p: The Cashierc application for smart phones for shop owners provides the best experience of the program and follow-up data.
